quiz1.missionText: Give a 'Like' to the cat photo in your timeline!

insight.title: How did a double-tap 'Like' the post?
insight.subtitle: Double-tap = 'Like' is a standard SNS gesture
insight.doubleTapDesc: On X (formerly Twitter) and Instagram, you can quickly double-tap a post's photo to 'Like' it. It's an intuitive way to interact without searching for the heart button.
insight.heartDesc: When you double-tap, a large heart appears in the center of the image. This feedback animation tells you that your action was correctly recognized.
insight.gestureDesc: Common gestures like 'double-tap to like' are used across many platforms like Instagram, X, and TikTok. Once learned, they can be used in many apps.

insight.title: Why did the post screen appear from the bottom?
insight.subtitle: The '+' button is a sign for 'Create New'
insight.swipeTitle: The role of the FAB (Floating Action Button)
insight.swipeDesc: The '+' button floating at the bottom right indicates the most important action (posting in SNS). It's placed where your thumb can easily reach it.
insight.fullscreenDesc: When you open the post screen, the input field is automatically focused, and the keyboard appears, allowing you to start typing immediately.
insight.backDesc: The post button is dimmed when no text is entered. As you type, the color deepens, visually signaling that the action is now possible.

quiz3.missionText: Open an image and then return to the previous screen.

insight.title: How did swiping down close the image?
insight.subtitle: Swipe down = 'Back/Close' intuitive action
insight.swipeTitle: Swipe down is an intuitive 'Close' gesture
insight.swipeDesc: Swiping (flicking) down on a full-screen image returns you to the previous screen. The 'dropping' sensation ties intuitively to the act of closing.
insight.fullscreenTitle: Full screen mode opens with a tap
insight.fullscreenDesc: In SNS apps, tapping an image opens it in full-screen mode, allowing you to zoom in or view it in more detail.
insight.backDesc: On mobile UIs, you can often close screens with swipe gestures even without an 'X' button. Trying different gestures is key.

insight.title: How did 'from:' work for searching?
insight.subtitle: Search commands for efficient filtering
insight.longPressDesc: Typing 'from:username' allows you to search for posts from a specific user. SNS search bars often support such commands for advanced filtering.
insight.subAccountDesc: The magnifying glass icon is a global symbol for 'Search'. You can intuitively switch functions using the icons in the tab bar.
insight.multiAccountDesc: The cursor automatically moves to the search bar when you switch to the search tab, allowing you to start typing without an extra tap.
